rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for implementation-level signal routing must be placed in the implementation scope after relevant subcomponents and connections
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Component type contracts should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without referencing implementation-only subcomponent paths
Preserve AADL architecture by placing annex blocks in appropriate scopes relative to component hierarchy
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Implementation contracts must not contain guarantee statements; use assign for output bindings only
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables or outputs
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-specific signal routing guarantees in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst component type and implementation extraction
